summary: iter253 testing complete. 20/20 backend tests pass. All frontend components verified: Invoice ingest with 3 William-uploaded invoices (Cusanos $91.15, Halperns $88.40, Mr Greens $2950.64), vendor SKU lookup (butter→Plugra $130, avocado→Hass, chicken breast), notification preferences modal with event×channel grid, save-the-ticket AI remediation, tonight's playbook 4pm push, approval banner with expand drawer showing INVOICE DETAIL + INVOICE DOCUMENT sections, avatar dropdown with size controls and profile switcher.
critical_code_review_comments: Invoice ingest correctly seeds 3 William-uploaded invoices with proper totals and line items
Vendor SKU lookup uses fuzzy token-overlap scoring on _search field for recipe ingredient matching
Notification prefs correctly implements CDC's cascade rule: po_received for executive-chef cascades to sous-chef
Save-the-ticket endpoint uses Claude AI (with fallback) to draft comp + amenity recommendations
Tonight's playbook fans out to all salaried roles via notification preferences
Approval banner has readable contrast (white text on dark gold gradient header)
Approval row expand button ('+') opens inline drawer with INVOICE DETAIL and INVOICE DOCUMENT sections
Avatar dropdown includes size controls (avatar-size-down/up) that persist to localStorage
Notification prefs modal shows full event×channel grid with checkboxes
Topbar cleanup: Language picker removed (now in System Settings only), only Settings gear remains
Sidebar Hotel Operations group contains outlook-mail, gmail, ms-teams, whiteboard items
test_credentials: Admin: admin@luccca.com / LuccaaAdmin2026! ; devAuth=1 query param for bypass
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 3 William-uploaded invoices at startup: Cusanos Italian Bakery (inv-6243401, $91.15, 4 lines), Halperns (inv-12118378, $88.40, 1 line), Mr Greens (inv-NC9994, $2950.64, 27 lines). Each creates approval request routed per hierarchy.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter253 fully tested: (1) /api/invoices returns 3 seeded invoices with correct totals. (2) /api/invoices/{id} returns full doc with pdf_filename and lines array. (3) /api/invoices/file/{name} serves PDFs with application/pdf content-type. (4) /api/vendor-skus/lookup fuzzy-matches ingredients (butter→Plugra $130, avocado→Hass, chicken breast→Halperns). (5) /api/approvals/banner?for_user=sous_chef_user returns Cusanos+Halperns (from demo-hourly-001 staff). (6) /api/approvals/banner?for_user=executive_chef_user returns Mr Greens (sous-chef requested, exceeds $2k limit). (7) /api/notif-prefs/{user_id} returns prefs with event_keys and channel_keys. (8) CDC's po_received=['in_app','text'] cascades to sous-chef. (9) /api/notif-prefs/fire fans out with cascade rules. (10) /api/service-recovery/save-the-ticket creates AI draft with status=pending_gm_approval. (11) /api/playbook/run generates narrative and delivers to salaried roles. (12) Frontend: approval-banner shows 'N APPROVAL(S) NEEDED' with readable contrast. (13) Expand '+' button opens drawer with INVOICE DETAIL + INVOICE DOCUMENT sections. (14) Avatar dropdown has size controls (avatar-size-down/up) persisting to localStorage. (15) Notification prefs modal shows event×channel checkbox grid. (16) Topbar: Language picker removed, only Settings gear remains. (17) Sidebar Hotel Operations has outlook-mail, gmail, ms-teams, whiteboard.
